Name: Shadow Truffle
Appearance: Black and rough like coal, with dark purple flesh
Flavor Profile: 90% dark chocolate mixed with espresso and umami
Ration-Bricks: Pressed into dense, non-perishable bricks for military rations
Luxury Confectionery: Refined with sugar and milk, becomes the most expensive dessert
Harvest Method: Monkeys must climb down into the dark underside to dig out
Danger: Harvesters often fight for their haul, with risks from spiders and bats
